$schema_note: Curated image library. The VisualDirector loads this once at startup and mirrors entries into the image_assets table. Files referenced under `file` are served at /static/images/<file>. To add an image: drop the file into the directory, add an entry here, restart the API. Re-indexing is automatic.
$style_guide: 16:9 (1920x1080+), photographic realism, cool teal-and-amber color grading, no overlay text, no logos, no watermarks. Trainee POV or shoulder-of-trainee framing where applicable. Avoid posed stock-photo smiles.

$batches.1_elena_avatars: Avatars used in the NPCPanel for diagnosis_dilemma. Square crops, head-and-shoulders, neutral background.
$batches.2_diagnosis_dilemma_scenes: Scene set covering exam_room, consultation_room, imaging_lab — enough to play diagnosis_dilemma end-to-end.
$batches.3_transitions_fallback: Neutral framings used when no good scene match exists.

images.description: Square portrait of Elena, a 45-year-old woman with light brown hair tied back, plain blouse, plain grey background. Faint cautious half-smile, eye contact with camera. Soft natural daylight from camera-left. Calm but slightly guarded expression.
Same Elena, slightly leaning forward, biting her lower lip very subtly, eyes off-camera to the right (avoiding direct contact). Slightly cooler lighting. Visible mild tension in the brow.
Same Elena, hand at her mouth, eyes glistening but composed, not actively crying. Looking just past the camera. Very still — the moment after hearing the news. Lighting softer, slightly desaturated.
Same Elena, direct eye contact with camera, faint resolved nod implied, shoulders squared. Steadier expression than 'calm_initial' — present, focused. Slightly warmer lighting.
Same Elena, real and unforced smile, slight color in her cheeks, shoulders dropped. Warm side light. Looks like a person who has come through something.

Mid-shot of Elena seated on a paper-covered exam table, hands folded in her lap, looking down. Modern outpatient exam room with a window casting soft daylight from camera-right. The bottom edge of the trainee's laptop is visible in the foreground (over-the-shoulder POV). Pale walls, a blood-pressure cuff on the wall.

Same exam room, Elena seated on the exam table looking at the camera (the doctor), faint relieved half-smile, shoulders dropped. Same window light but slightly warmer. Same laptop edge in foreground. The space feels less clinical.

Trainee POV in the exam room. A female nurse in mid-30s scrubs stands respectfully on the left of the frame, hands clasped in front. Elena is seated opposite, slight blur on her face — the moment immediately after being told. A tissue box is on the desk in the bottom-right foreground. Soft, slightly cooler fluorescent light. Hushed atmosphere.

Elena seated on the exam table, hand to mouth, eyes wet but composed (not actively sobbing). A box of tissues on the desk in the foreground, one tissue slightly pulled out. Window light dimmer, blinds half-drawn. Very still composition.

Trainee at a clinic workstation desk holding a desk phone to ear, looking at a CT scan or chart on the monitor. Side-light from a window camera-left. Stack of patient files at the corner of the desk. Clean modern Soviet-era-renovated clinic feel.

A 4-person huddle in a hallway corner near the nurse station. A senior physician with glasses (mid-50s, white coat) gestures at a tablet held by a nurse. Two other clinicians lean in. Mixed scrub colors. Sense of rapid coordination. Wide-ish lens, slight over-the-shoulder framing for the trainee.

Tight shot of a chest CT axial slice on a wide diagnostic monitor in a dim radiology reading room. A faint silhouette of a clinician reflected in the screen. Greyscale dominant, with the warm glow of an adjacent task lamp at the edge of frame.

A pathology lab bench, mid-shot. A microscope on the right, a slide tray with several slides on the left, a single gloved hand placing one slide onto the microscope stage. Cool blue-white overhead light. No faces. Very clinical, focused composition.

Soft, abstract framing — an empty pale-walled hospital corridor with a single light source from the end of the hall. Nothing dramatic. Used as the fallback when no curated scene matches the current world state.
